notes: Tried all proton variable combinations, no dice. When starting the game it shows a blank screen for some seconds then opens up a "Fatal Error!" dialog window. Opened up a compatibility report on proton's github, https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2847 and also commented this status on the proper steam thread at https://steamcommunity.com/app/732240/discussions/0/1742216566127593383/?ctp=4 -- please check those for updated instructions if you want to run the game (it's UE4, so it should run at some point).
title: SpaceBourne
